project_type: C# CDK infrastructure app (.NET 8) for an event-driven sleep audio processing pipeline
build_system: dotnet CLI with CDK CLI (cdk synth). Solution file at src/CdkBase.sln
test_framework: xUnit with Amazon.CDK.Assertions for CloudFormation template verification
verification_instructions: This is a documentation-only task. Verify that ARCHITECTURE.md and AGENT_GUIDELINES.md have correct markdown syntax and that the Mermaid diagram uses GitHub-compatible syntax. No code compilation needed.
setup_instructions: No setup needed - this is a documentation-only task.
environment_constraints: COMMON_DEPENDENCIES network mode. .NET SDK is not pre-installed in the sandbox, but that is irrelevant since this task only creates/updates markdown files.
contribution_requirements: TDD-first development approach per README. Architecture docs in docs/ directory. CI runs dotnet build, dotnet test, and cdk synth.
key_patterns: Existing ARCHITECTURE.md has a skeleton structure with Overview, Event-Driven Design, Components, Data Flow, TDD Approach, and Future Roadmap sections. The project uses CDK context flags for best practices. The CI pipeline is at .github/workflows/ci.yml.
directory_structure: Root: README.md, cdk.json, LICENSE. src/CdkBase/ has the CDK app (Program.cs, CdkBaseStack.cs). src/CdkBase.Tests/ has xUnit tests. docs/ has ARCHITECTURE.md. .github/workflows/ has CI config.
